dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Initiate from a link, Unleash into infinite scripts.
dashboard.lucianGreeting: Hello, I am Lucian. Which great idea would you like to unleash with Ý Lâm today?
dashboard.lucianIdleReminder: Are you contemplating something? I am here to listen. Give me a link or speak your ideas, and we will create something different together.
dashboard.ylamInactivityReminder: What content can Ý Lâm help you create?

hook.title: 7-second hook
hook.subtitle: Fast cut, guiding question, curiosity
hook.body: Open with a clear contrast. Add a leading question. End with a promised outcome.

story3.title: 3-act story script
story3.subtitle: Setup → Conflict → Resolution
story3.body: Introduce a character and goal. Add an obstacle. Increase pace with 2–3 concrete details. Close with a takeaway.

summaryCta.title: Summary + subtle CTA
summaryCta.subtitle: Pack the core ideas and a next step
summaryCta.body: Summarize 3 points. Propose one action. Invite comments about their experience.
